provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Regulations may be cited as the Building Societies (Classification of Urban Certificate of Rights Plots as Urban Immovable Property) Regulations.

provisions.title: Interpretation
provisions.content:
2. Interpretation
In these Regulations "urban certificate of rights plot" means a plot of land within a township specified in a certificate of rights issued in respect of the plot whereby a grant or other disposition thereof has been made and executed in terms of the State Land Act (Cap. 32:01).

provisions.title: Immovable urban property
provisions.content:
3. Immovable urban property
Every piece of land comprised in an urban certificate of rights plot is hereby classified as urban immovable property for the purposes of the Act.

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Regulations may be cited as the Building Societies (Conversion) Regulations.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition: a plot of land within a township specified in a certificate of rights issued in respect of the plot whereby a grant or other disposition thereof has been made and executed in terms of the State Land Act (Cap. 32:01).
a statement issued by a society at the time of conversion

a distribution of funds of the society or the conferral of right in relation to shares, if any, of a successor company proposed to be made to, or upon members of a society as a result of the conversion
